item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Eh. A argument can be made that you incorrectly used amnestics. But all and all, I don’t think that matters, the punch at the end came swiftly and out of nowhere. Also after the gut punch instead of any explanation all we have is “Oh Shit” which I think helps the work. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My favorite part is the 'Oh shit' at the end. He KNOWS the O5 are going to come down on this like a hammer.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Can I just say that the last part of the Interview log got me, I had a feeling that was coming and I was right… And I loved it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for your help. :) I made most of your corrections, although I kept the Class-C amnestics because I am getting them from this guide. There are other ones I could've used, such as Class-H and Class-I before the interview, but I thought Class-C afterwards would be more efficient.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I knew to expect something special with the 4630-2, but that twist took me by surprise. Well done, great first scip! +1

+ Nitpicks
- Nitpicks

You have some formatting things that bug me. In your interview logs you add a horizontal separate before the [END LOG], which isn't correct. It's also inconsistent with the [START LOG]. I would also recommend making the [XX LOG]s bold.

Also I would remove the horizontal separator before the first audio log and replace it with an "Addendum 4630-1: Interview Excerpts" or something. The horizontal separators between interviews are not necessary in my opinion, quote blocks by their nature offer a visual separation between items.

Level 5 Clearance

Level-5 clearance

Class C amnestics

Class-C, but given that the interview is presumably only a few hours at most, I don't see why Class-As aren't sufficient.

further experiments using this method have been abandoned.

I would say "further experiments are suspended" or discontinued, not "abandoned".

DATE: 02242017

Kind of hard to read. Also I would recommend using the ISO date format.

SCP-4630-2: Because I'm O5-█, Joseph Cobb, you simpleton. I'm sorry, that was uncalled for. I'm just in shock is all.

This transition is a bit harsh, maybe add a "(Pause)" after "you simpleton".

item.title: Congrats on your first SCP!
item.content:encoded: The interview logs are what really hook me here. Nice work.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I wanted to thank Fraudator Mortem, Proasek, Fitnessgram (On IRC), Tyvan Delfar, and Kakroom for critting. This skip wouldn't be where it is without you. :)
